name: Rahma Ben Jemaa
title: Ex IEEE IAS ENIS SBC Chairwoman
quote: As the chair of IEEE IAS ENIS SBC, my journey has been transformative. Through challenges and perseverance, my team and I earned recognition as the Best IEEE IAS Chapter globally, with numerous awards and impactful workshops. Leadership, for me, is about action, not authority. Success is earned through hard work, learning, and facing fears, and I believe a strong, supportive team is key to achieving great things.

name: Katem Khedhiri
title: Ex IEEE IAS ENIS SBC Chairman
quote: Being the Ex IEEE IAS ENIS SBC chairman was one of the best experiences I have ever had, it has changed me a lot, I learnt various skills, both technical and social, I have always been the type of person who wants to face new challenges, This desire is where my experience with IEEE began, and I am willing to resume my experience as an IEEE volunteer.

name: Mezri Azaiez
title: Quality Assurance Engineer & Tsyp'17 Chairman & Ex IEEE ENIS SB Chairman
quote: I was IEEE ENIS SB Chapter Chair. The IEEE Industry Applications Society (IAS) is one of the largest special interest societies within IEEE. The IAS focuses specifically on the unique needs of industry and commerce. I adore Volunteering; I learned a lot from such noble work. IEEE was an opportunity to develop my skills, I learned how to manage both Team and Time.

name: Amir Abid
title: Ex IEEE IAS ENIS SBC Chairman
quote: During my time as IEEE IAS ENIS Chairman, the journey was truly remarkable. I learned invaluable lessons in teamwork, stress management, and the importance of familial bonds. We were more than just a board — we were a close-knit family, supporting each other through thick and thin. I'm grateful for every moment shared and proud of our collective achievements.

name: Jawhar Ben Salem
title: Software Engineer & Ex IEEE Committee Coordinator
quote: My IEEE experience was really something to mark in my life. It was an advantageous experience to my career. I gained a lot of skills that have been a benefit to me and to my professional career. A really unique experience.

name: Amine Abid
title: Ex IEEE IAS ENIS SBC Chairman
quote: Being the IEEE IAS ENIS SBC Chairman, wasn't only a great experience for me, it was way more than that. This chapter in my life enabled me to thrive on both my studies and my personal growth. New skills, new managing strategies, new focus on matters essentially connected to my field of study — all of these perks are just a drop of the sea of benefits that I gained.

name: Dhiaa Mejdi
title: Ex IEEE IAS ENIS SBC Chairman
quote: IEEE ENIS IAS SBC was a turning moment in my life. Taught me discipline, taught me teamwork, and most importantly shaped my personality and skills on so many levels. Working with the best team was a part of it. A true family indeed, and as our motto goes 'Write your name in History, and be the flame of Industry'. #IAS_Family
